name: Ham and Veggie Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups frozen mixed veggies, cooked and drained
1 can Cream of Mushroom soup (Campbell's 98% Fat-Free)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
3. Bake at 350°F until heated through and bubbly.
4. Serve warm from the oven.
Note: For best results, use fresh, steamed vegetables instead of frozen mixed veggies.
